message:
feat(fcp-core): make FcpConnector::rate_limits() return Option to preserve unknown state

Change rate_limits() return type from RateLimitDeclarations to
Option<RateLimitDeclarations>, defaulting to None instead of an empty
struct. This distinguishes "connector has not declared rate limits" from
"connector declares no rate limits." Update SDK trait tests to assert
is_none() for the default case and Some() for explicit declarations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
